programme.title: S1E1 Draft Story
programme.desc: In Part 1, we uncover the story of Tyvis Powell and the people who shaped him into the man and football player he is today. His road to the NFL was anything but easy, and it nearly never happened without the guidance of his mentor, Sean Williams. A Draft Story is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he makes the leap to professional football. Though he was not invited to Chicago for the 2016 NFL Draft, his journey is unforgettable. Witness the tension, hope, and emotion as Tyvis waits for the call that will change his life and etch the Powell name into NFL history. This is his Draft Story.

programme.title: S1 E2 Draft Story
programme.desc: A Draft Story” Part 2 is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he takes the leap into professional football. Facing unexpected challenges, honoring a promise to local kids, and navigating a situation he never imagined, Tyvis proves that the journey to the NFL is full of twists, heart, and determination.

But it’s the fiery beauty Rio (Jane Russell, in her breakout role) who sparks the most dangerous conflict of all. With smoldering romance, tense standoffs, and Hughes’ bold style, this legendary film pushed boundaries and made Hollywood history.

programme.title: Nacho Mountain
programme.desc: Keefer has a talent. He can eat...A LOT. But it’s not until after getting fired from his job, finding his girl getting railed by a tranny and almost getting arrested for drug trafficking, that Keefer decides (with the help of his best friend Meegosh) to start an underground food eating competition. After the health crazed Mayor Fingstal and his cronies Officers Slivjack and Biggsley catch wind of it, all hell breaks loose. Then it all comes down to one final food battle from hell, THE NACHO MOUNTAIN! Set to a killer Stoner Rock soundtrack with loads of babes and crazy characters in the vein of Porky's and Meatballs, Nacho Mountain is sure to please those who have gotten beaten down, only to eat their way to the top!

programme.title: Almost Invisible: The Party's Over When You're Dead
programme.desc: To ease the weight of their college workload, unsuspecting teenagers seize the opportunity to turn their end-of-the-summer party into a house wrecking foray.The popular clique accepts an invite from the high school freak as an excuse to have the party of their lives and trash her parents house. What happens instead they will never forget. The freak turns them on to a world they never knew existed. In a tale about breaking free from the past, the teenagers are throttled into a strange and mysterious realm filled with murder and suicide. Beware unseen forces that exist in our daily lives, beware the Invisible.

programme.title: Coven of Evil
programme.desc: SHORT - A journalist invited to a ritual is magnetically drawn towards a mysterious young girl and the bizarre, deadly world of modern-day witchcraft.

programme.title: Paranormal Horrors of The True North
programme.desc: Canada has a rich and colorful history which has resulted in a variety of paranormal phenomena from coast to coast. Outdoor enthusiasts hiking the Bruce Trail in Ancaster, Ontario often find themselves at the remains of a once great mansion. Known as the Hermitage Ruins, visitors encounter two very different spirits on a regular basis. The first is a coachman who hung himself on the property and still carries the severed noose around his neck. The second apparition is a woman who once owned the mansion and loved it so much that she refused to leave even after it burned down. The “Espirit” is Montreal’s hottest nightclub. While it has had many names over the years, one thing has remained constant – it’s ghostly apparitions. During the latest renovations, many workers witnessed a large ball of light floating towards them, and even passing through them. Others saw the ghost of a woman, with a horrific scar running the length of her pale torso. The War of 1812 was a definitive moment in Canadian history, inflicting thousands of casualties. One fight in particular left an impression on Niagara Falls, Ontario. The Battle for Lundy’s Lane was so grueling; it claimed hundreds of lives in mere hours. At Drummond Hill Cemetery three such ghostly casualties remain; forever on duty watching the gates. Prepare for an exciting thrill ride to some of Canada's most haunted locations.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Illinois isn’t the first state you think about when it comes to waterfowl, but the Wentz Brothers have dialed in some honey holes over the years. On this episode, a slew of waterfowl experts put to the test some of the newest Winchester waterfowl ammunition during the great migration of the Mississippi Flyway in early December. We’ll also head north to the shores of Kodiak Island, Alaska with Chris and Casey Keefer as they push the limits of Winchester’s new Last Call Double Shot on fast-ripping sea ducks. GUESTS: Zach Wentz (Team Winchester) Nathan Robinson (Winchester Ammunition) Ryan Swaner (Winchester Repeating Arms) Chris Jennings (Ducks Unlimited) Mike Brasher (Ducks Unlimited) Scott Olmsted (American Hunter) Travis Hall (Field & Stream) Chris Keefer (Team Winchester) Casey Keefer (Team Winchester)

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Col. Nick Nichols from Folds of Honor and Olympic skeet shooter Dania Vizzi are both proud Americans who have represented their country overseas. Col. Nichols commanded the air in the cockpit of a fighter jet for countless missions during his seven combat tours and Dania donned the stars and bars proudly on her shooting vest as an Olympian in Paris. Now with Winchesters in hand, both are in the Midwest whitetail woods during late November during the back end of the rut hoping to connect on a Missouri monarch.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: The positive impact made by the shooting sports and recreational shooting to people across our country can’t be measured in just one story, so we have three. In Florida, Olympian Dania Vizzi trains at her home shooting facility and talk about how she went from ballerina to one of the best shotgun shooters in the world. In Nebraska, firearms instructor Thea Van Syoc has used the disciplines of competitive pistol shooting and training to help shape her life. Finally we’ll take a look into the National African American Gun Association and learn how one day at the range for Phillip Smith created the fastest growing firearm organization in the United States.

programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Airtime Ep32: The Titans of Windsurfing - Maui, Hawaii
programme.desc: Big-wave windsurfing history catches up with the present as European Champion Tristan Boxford takes us inside the progression of the sport. On Maui, Hawaii, meet the legends; hear how it all started and where it's going. Hang out with pioneers like Robby Naish, Jason Polakow, the Angulo brothers, as well as windsurfing's present rulers Levi Siver, Kauli Seadi and Daida Moreno. From board-shaping to riding big waves at Jaws and Hookipa, learn about the birthplace of a sport.

programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep613: Whitewater Kayaking Africa’s Zambezi River
programme.desc: World-renowned kayaker Steve Fisher brings together a crew of big-water pros to experience the force of Africa’s mighty Zambezi River at record levels. Steeped in the brotherhood of kayaking, Fisher, and his fellow paddlers, run head-on into some of the most radical rapids ever recorded

programme.title: Hot Water Ep121: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour
programme.desc: Round 2 from Portimao, Portugal, where the mighty Atlantic meets the graceful Arade River, in a country with an illustrious and glorious maritime history, where the waves crash and the sprays soar, the second round of the UIM F1H2O season kicks off.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep411: Tahiti
programme.desc: Host Nikki Gregg explores the turquoise waters and breathtaking tropical islands of French Polynesia on her stand-up paddleboard.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail meet with the team at Advanced Vitality to explore the cutting edge of preventative healthcare. With over 60% of Americans facing accelerated cellular aging, the company is looking to scale fast—and needs the right strategy to do it. Next, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s joins the conversation to share how her insect-based dog treats are creating buzz in the pet industry. Her clever and down-to-earth grassroots marketing approach (pun intended) is changing the game for alternative protein sources. Finally, Kevin and Toli sit down with leaders from Hammer Haag Steel and Zenith Trek to dive into the challenges and opportunities of building complex, large-scale equipment and structures.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The A-Team gets back to work—this time diving into cross-marketing strategies for Advanced Vitality. Over at Hammer Haag, the team discusses launching a gritty new “Micro Dirty Jobs” miniseries to spotlight American manufacturing in action. We’re also introduced to serial entrepreneur Jeff Kline, founder of 1-800-Medigap, who brings a powerhouse presence to the team’s growing roster. Meanwhile, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s returns for a full brand overhaul with the experts. Newest A-Team member Rudy Mawer steps in with high-level influencer insight and a mission to empower the next generation of entrepreneurs. And finally, Zenith Trek makes bold moves to break into big box retail—with the A-Team guiding the way.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: The rain simulator is up and running and the results are shocking. But where do we go from here? How do we fix what’s broken and return to farming with Mother Nature and not against it? Wayne Swanson in Chattanooga Tennessee has some answers. This special episode of Farm Hero highlights the important mission American farmers are on tackling to protect and revitalize our soil… with the help of some Swiss Army Bugs.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: In part one of the season finale, Laura is immersing herself in all the wonders that are TomKat ranch. Created by Kat Taylor and Tom Steyer, TomKat ranch is part ranch, part laboratory, part educational facility and all around the American Dream. This ranch is doing their part at spear-heading the rural revitalization that will bring about climate stability and a healthier planet.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: The first part of the season finale starts now. Jesse’s back on his home turf of Clearwater, Florida, at Clearwater Academy International with not one, but TWO of his top players: Luca Stanzani and Dylan Djeté – who’ve both been playing football since they were little. Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Land Of Teranga | Brilliant Corners: Senegal, Episode 1
programme.desc: Sam Bleakley starts his journey through Senegal joined by Irish big wave surfer Easkey Britton and French pro Adrien Toyon. Their first stop is N'Gor Island, where they ride the wave seen in the opening sequence of "Endless Summer." On the island, they learn about Teranga, the Senegalese quality of hospitality, sharing, and welcomeness. They also meet up with Marta Imarisio, who has helped inspire the country's women and girls to get into surfing.

programme.title: 2025 Surf Abu Dhabi Pro | Highlights
programme.desc: Relive the 2025 Abu Dhabi Pro Finals as CT surfing debuts in the Middle East on a world-class wave.

programme.title: Inside Pro Surfing: Surf Abu Dhabi Pro 2025
programme.desc: The WSL Championship Tour makes its groundbreaking debut in the Middle East at the 2025 Surf Abu Dhabi Pro. The second stop on the CT marks professional surfing's continued global expansion and also establishes Abu Dhabi as an official surf destination. Engineered for excellence, this high-performance wave will provide a canvas for the world's best surfers set against a stunning backdrop of the Arabian Gulf. The event will showcase not only the remarkable evolution of professional surfing beyond its traditional roots, but also the infinite possibility for progression from athletes like rookie Erin Brooks, former World Champion Italo Ferreira, and reigning World Champ Caity Simmers.

programme.title: Hogslayer
programme.desc: The award-winning true-life story of the dual-engine Norton motorcycle dragster designed, built, and raced by TC Christenson and John Gregory of Sunset Motors. The documentary chronicles the Sunset Motors Racing Team’s unrivaled innovation and unbridled courage as they faced unyielding challengers throughout the United States and Europe in the 1970’s. TC and John are featured as they relate their experiences of those years rising from local street racers to the top race team in the world. This is bench-racing at its best directly from the original Sunset Motors in Kenosha, Wisconsin, home of the Hogslayer.

programme.title: The Motocross Files
programme.desc: David Bailey’s story is one of dedication and inspiration. The factory Honda rider won five National Championships before a tragic injury in 1987 ended his motocross career giving him the biggest challenge of his life and inspiring greatness once again.

programme.title: Where Cars Don't Dare
programme.desc: Where Cars Don't Dare follows AdMo Tours on a remarkable journey through the Mojave Desert by dirt bike. We have our courage tested against sand dunes, dry lake beds, salt basins, snow, and mountains - all without ever touching asphalt. Winner of the 2011 The Accolades International Film Competition.

programme.title: El Camino
programme.desc: Superior in In this episode of El Camino Motorcycle TV, join us as we ride from Southern Ontario to the majestic shores of Lake Superior. Discover why this Great Lake is truly superior, inspired by Gordon Lightfoot's haunting ballad.

programme.title: Naked Speed
